Grovekeeper ZvZ Engage Tank

zvzEngage TankHammer
ActiveExpert RecommendedExpensiveRecommended
Patch: latestLast verified: 15/6/2026Recommended tier: T8Min IP: 1,500Difficulty: hardParty: 20

Equipment

Main HandGrovekeeperT8.0
HeadJudicator HelmetT8.0
ChestGuardian ArmorT8.0
ShoesHunter ShoesT8.0
CapeMartlock CapeT8.0
FoodPork OmeletteT8.0
PotionResistance PotionT8.0

Pros

Best engage in ZvZ, massive AoE stun, sets up wipes

Cons

Very expensive, requires good call, single-use engage

Basic Combo

E (AoE stun) -> W (slow/armor pierce) -> Q -> reposition

Strong Against

Clumped teams, defensive formations

Weak Against

Spread compositions, kiting, Morgana cape

Notes

Must be called by shotcaller. Deadly combo with Permafrost or Clap DPS.

Albion Online changes constantly. Check the date of the last update before investing silver in this build.
